message:
fix(runtime): harden local task storage and task table against duplicate IDs

local.rs: Replace assert!(prev.is_none()) panic on duplicate local task ID
with a tracing::warn and silent replacement. Duplicate task IDs can occur
during edge-case scheduling races and should not crash the runtime. Also use
const initialization for the thread_local BTreeMap (minor optimization).
New test: duplicate_store_replaces_entry_without_panicking

task_table.rs: Additional hardening for task table operations against
duplicate or stale task IDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
